# NAB Rewards Signature Card

## Annual Fee
$295 per year

## Earn Rate
- Earn 1.25 NAB Rewards Points per $1 spent on eligible everyday purchases
- Earn 2.5 NAB Rewards Points per $1 spent at major supermarkets and petrol stations

## Welcome Bonus
Earn 100,000 bonus NAB Rewards Points when you spend $3,000 on eligible purchases in the first 60 days.

## Card Details
- Network: Visa
- Purchase rate: 19.99% p.a.
- Up to 44 interest-free days
- Minimum income: $35,000
